title: Feedback - send a Suggestion feedback with names/email
scenario: Suggestion feedback with name and email sent successfully from App Settings > Feedback section
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or gear icon to navigate to App Settings.
3. In App Settings, tap on Feedback.
4. On the Feedback screen, select the "Suggestion" option.
5. Enter text for the feedback body.
6. Enter the user's name and email address in the respective fields.
expected: The Suggestion feedback is successfully sent with the name and email attached. A confirmation message appears indicating the feedback was submitted.
